Forgery.phenomenal_success: The document is indistinguishable from genuine; even expert scrutiny does not expose it.
Forgery.catastrophic_failure: An obvious error — wrong seal, wrong title, impossible date — immediately exposes the forgery.

Forgery.description: The character copies a known person's handwriting and mark to authorise a fake transaction.
Forgery.success: The signature passes as genuine in normal trade dealings.
Forgery.failure: The signature is off; a suspicious party might compare it to a genuine example.
Forgery.phenomenal_success: The signature matches the original so well it could pass expert comparison.
Forgery.catastrophic_failure: The forgery is obvious to anyone who has seen the real signature.

Forward Observer.description: The character observes enemy positions from a vantage point and signals corrections to siege or ranged weapons.
Forward Observer.success: Accurate targeting information reaches the weapon crews; accuracy improves.
Forward Observer.failure: The corrections are inaccurate; no improvement in fire.
Forward Observer.phenomenal_success: Pinpoint observations allow a critical hit on a specific target.
Forward Observer.catastrophic_failure: The observer gives incorrect corrections; friendly fire results.

Freight Handling.description: The character loads cargo onto a wagon or cart, balancing weight correctly for safe transport.
Freight Handling.success: Cargo is loaded efficiently; the cart handles well and nothing is damaged.
Freight Handling.failure: Loading is slow or unbalanced; the cart handles poorly.
Freight Handling.phenomenal_success: The load is optimised; more cargo than expected fits and the cart is perfectly balanced.
Freight Handling.catastrophic_failure: The load is dangerously unbalanced; the cart tips or breaks an axle.

Freight Handling.description: The character inspects a shipment of goods, using knowledge of normal cargo to spot hidden items.
Freight Handling.success: Concealed contraband or hidden goods are found.
Freight Handling.phenomenal_success: The character finds the contraband and the method of concealment, providing evidence for prosecution.
Freight Handling.catastrophic_failure: The character overlooks obvious contraband or reports a legitimate shipment as suspicious.

Gambling.description: The character plays cards or dice, using probability knowledge and skill to gain an advantage.
Gambling.success: The character comes out ahead over the session; modest winnings are gained.
Gambling.failure: The character breaks even or loses a modest sum.
Gambling.phenomenal_success: The character cleans out the table, winning a large sum.
Gambling.catastrophic_failure: The character gambles away significant wealth or property in a losing streak.

Gambling.description: The character carefully watches an opponent in a game to catch them cheating with loaded dice or marked cards.
Gambling.success: The character spots the cheat and can call them out with evidence.
Gambling.phenomenal_success: The character catches the cheat in the act definitively, and may recover any losses.
Gambling.catastrophic_failure: The character accuses the wrong person, causing a serious social incident.

Gardening.description: The character plants, tends, and harvests medicinal or culinary herbs over a growing season.
Gardening.success: A useful supply of fresh herbs is maintained; a seasonal harvest is available.
Gardening.failure: Pests or neglect reduce the yield.
Gardening.phenomenal_success: The harvest is exceptional in quality and quantity; surplus is available for trade or medicine.
Gardening.catastrophic_failure: Disease or mismanagement ruins the herb garden completely; it must be replanted.

Geology.description: The character surveys rock formations to locate surface or shallow indicators of metal-bearing ore.
Geology.success: The character correctly identifies ore type and rough location.
Geology.failure: The survey is inconclusive; no reliable deposit is identified.
Geology.phenomenal_success: The character locates a rich deposit and estimates its extent and purity.
Geology.catastrophic_failure: The character confidently identifies a deposit that does not exist, wasting resources in excavation.

Geology.description: The character evaluates the ground conditions at a proposed building or mining site for stability.
Geology.success: The assessment is accurate; safe construction or excavation can proceed.
Geology.failure: Key instabilities are missed; minor problems arise.
Geology.phenomenal_success: The assessment is thorough; all risks are identified and mitigations suggested.
Geology.catastrophic_failure: The ground is declared sound when it is not; structures or tunnels fail dangerously.

Geometry.description: The character uses measuring rope and geometric principles to determine the boundaries and area of a land parcel.
Geometry.success: The survey is accurate; the measured area is correct for legal or tax purposes.
Geometry.failure: The survey contains an error; boundaries are slightly off.
Geometry.phenomenal_success: The survey is precise enough to resolve boundary disputes without further measurement.
Geometry.catastrophic_failure: A systematic error results in a badly wrong measurement, causing legal or financial problems.

Gesture.description: The character uses agreed-upon hand and body signals to convey tactical or simple information without sound.
Gesture.success: The message is clearly understood by the intended recipient.
Gesture.failure: The gesture is misunderstood; wrong action is taken.
Gesture.phenomenal_success: The entire message is conveyed with perfect clarity and speed.
Gesture.catastrophic_failure: The gesture is badly misinterpreted, leading to a dangerous mistake.

Heraldry.description: The character identifies the noble house or knight to whom a displayed coat of arms belongs.
Heraldry.success: The character correctly identifies the arms and their bearer.
Heraldry.failure: The character cannot place the arms.
Heraldry.phenomenal_success: The character identifies the arms and recalls relevant political connections and history of the house.
Heraldry.catastrophic_failure: The character misidentifies the arms, potentially causing a serious diplomatic incident.

Heraldry.description: The character designs a new coat of arms for a newly ennobled individual that follows heraldic rules.
Heraldry.success: The arms are valid and distinctive; they will be accepted by heralds.
Heraldry.failure: The arms violate a heraldic convention and require revision.
Heraldry.phenomenal_success: The arms are not only valid but elegant and memorable, rapidly becoming associated with their bearer.
Heraldry.catastrophic_failure: The arms duplicate an existing house's design, causing a serious dispute.

Hiking.action: Maintain Pace on a Long March
Hiking.description: The character sustains a steady walking pace over many hours without dropping from fatigue.
Hiking.success: The character completes the march and arrives ready to act.
Hiking.failure: Fatigue sets in; the character arrives exhausted and at reduced capability.
Hiking.phenomenal_success: The character arrives fresh and can immediately undertake further physical activity.
Hiking.catastrophic_failure: The character collapses from fatigue well short of the destination.

Hiking.description: The character crosses marshes, steep hills, or dense forest while carrying equipment.
Hiking.success: The crossing is made safely and in reasonable time.
Hiking.failure: Progress is slow and energy-draining; time is lost.
Hiking.phenomenal_success: The character finds the best path and crosses efficiently with minimal fatigue.
Hiking.catastrophic_failure: The character becomes stuck, sprains an ankle, or loses the path and must backtrack.

History.description: The character searches their knowledge of history to find a past event relevant to a current legal, military, or political situation.
History.success: The character recalls an accurate and relevant precedent that can support their argument.
History.failure: The character cannot recall anything applicable.
History.phenomenal_success: The character recalls an obscure but highly relevant precedent that significantly strengthens their position.
History.catastrophic_failure: The character cites a misremembered event; a knowledgeable opponent corrects them, weakening their credibility.

History.description: The character examines an object claimed to be of historical significance to assess its authenticity.
History.success: The character correctly determines whether the object is genuine or fake.
History.phenomenal_success: The character correctly authenticates the object and provides a detailed account of its likely provenance.
History.catastrophic_failure: The character certifies a fake as genuine or dismisses an authentic artefact.

Holdout.action: Conceal a Weapon on One's Person
Holdout.description: The character secretes a knife, vial, or other item on their body to pass a search.
Holdout.success: The item is concealed; a casual search finds nothing.
Holdout.failure: The concealment is inadequate; a thorough search will find it.
Holdout.phenomenal_success: The item is so well hidden that even a thorough body search fails to find it.
Holdout.catastrophic_failure: The item is obvious immediately; the character is caught in the attempt.

Housekeeping.description: The character arranges, cleans, and prepares a lord's rooms for occupation or guests.
Housekeeping.success: The chambers are immaculate and properly prepared; the lord is satisfied.
Housekeeping.failure: Something is missed; a detail is noticed and the character is rebuked.
Housekeeping.phenomenal_success: The preparation is so thorough and thoughtful that the lord comments favourably; a small favour may result.
Housekeeping.catastrophic_failure: An important item is misplaced or damaged; serious displeasure results.

Intelligence Analysis.description: The character reads a scout or spy's account and extracts militarily or politically actionable conclusions.
Intelligence Analysis.success: The character correctly identifies the most important insights and their implications.
Intelligence Analysis.failure: The analysis misses key points; the conclusions are neutral or misleading.
Intelligence Analysis.phenomenal_success: The character draws subtle inferences that reveal enemy intentions not explicitly stated in the report.
Intelligence Analysis.catastrophic_failure: The character reaches completely wrong conclusions; decisions based on this analysis backfire badly.

Interrogation.description: The character uses threats, isolation, and psychological pressure to break a prisoner's resistance and extract information.
Interrogation.failure: The prisoner endures without revealing anything.
Interrogation.phenomenal_success: The prisoner is completely broken; they reveal everything and may become cooperative.
Interrogation.catastrophic_failure: The prisoner dies, goes mad, or becomes so traumatised they cannot speak; all information is lost.

Interrogation.description: The character pressures or manipulates a reluctant but not hostile person into revealing what they know.
Interrogation.success: The witness reveals the information they were withholding.
Interrogation.failure: The witness refuses to say more.
Interrogation.phenomenal_success: The witness reveals more than they intended, including details they thought irrelevant.
Interrogation.catastrophic_failure: The witness is frightened into silence or runs to alert someone; the situation becomes dangerous.

Intimidation.description: The character uses threats, menacing posture, and tone to force someone to comply with a demand.
Intimidation.success: The person backs down and does as demanded.
Intimidation.failure: The person is unimpressed or too frightened to comply but does not capitulate.
Intimidation.phenomenal_success: The person is so thoroughly cowed they comply and become servile for the remainder of the interaction.
Intimidation.catastrophic_failure: The intimidation provokes defiance or violence; the person calls for help or attacks.

Jeweler.description: The character examines a precious stone for cut, clarity, and size to determine its market value.
Jeweler.success: The character gives an accurate value estimate.
Jeweler.failure: The estimate is off; the gem is over- or under-valued.
Jeweler.phenomenal_success: The character identifies the gem's precise quality and origin, providing an expert certificate of value.
Jeweler.catastrophic_failure: The character mistakes a glass fake for a genuine stone or vice versa.

Jeweler.action: Set a Stone in a Mount
Jeweler.description: The character secures a precious stone into a prepared metal mount without damaging it.
Jeweler.success: The stone is firmly and beautifully set.
Jeweler.failure: The setting is insecure or flawed; the stone may work loose.
Jeweler.phenomenal_success: The setting is exquisite; it enhances the stone's appearance and the piece's value.
Jeweler.catastrophic_failure: The stone is chipped or cracked during setting; it is permanently damaged.

Jumping.description: The character takes a running leap across a chasm, alley, or gap between structures.
Jumping.success: The character clears the gap and lands safely.
Jumping.failure: The character falls short; they grab the far edge or fall.
Jumping.phenomenal_success: The character clears the gap easily and lands on their feet in a ready position.
Jumping.catastrophic_failure: The character misjudges and falls into the gap, taking falling damage.

Knot-Tying.description: The character ties a captive's wrists and ankles with knots that resist escape attempts.
Knot-Tying.success: The captive is securely bound; escape requires a successful Escape roll at -2.
Knot-Tying.failure: The knots are inadequate; the captive can work free easily.
Knot-Tying.phenomenal_success: The bindings are masterfully applied; escape is extremely difficult and will take a very long time.
Knot-Tying.catastrophic_failure: The character uses a slipping knot; the captive escapes almost immediately.

Knot-Tying.description: The character anchors a rope for descent or crossing using appropriate knots and points of attachment.
Knot-Tying.success: The rig holds under a person's weight; descent is safe.
Knot-Tying.failure: The rig is adequate but marginal; there is risk of slippage.
Knot-Tying.phenomenal_success: The rig is bombproof; it will easily hold multiple people's weight.
Knot-Tying.catastrophic_failure: The rig fails under load; anyone using it falls.

Language.description: The character uses imperfect command of a foreign tongue to conduct a negotiation or convey important information.
Language.success: The essential points are communicated and understood despite gaps.
Language.failure: The communication fails on key points; misunderstandings arise.
Language.phenomenal_success: The character bridges the gap perfectly; fluency is no longer an obstacle.
Language.catastrophic_failure: A critical mistranslation creates serious misunderstanding or offence.

Language.description: The character acts as interpreter in a formal meeting between parties speaking different languages.
Language.success: The interpretation is accurate; both parties understand each other correctly.
Language.failure: Minor errors occur; small misunderstandings develop.
Language.phenomenal_success: The interpretation is flawless and includes cultural nuance that aids negotiation.
Language.catastrophic_failure: A major error distorts a key statement; one party feels insulted or misled.

Law.action: Argue a Case Before a Court
Law.description: The character presents legal arguments on behalf of a client in a formal tribunal or lord's court.
Law.success: The argument is sound and persuasive; the outcome favours the client.
Law.failure: The argument is weak or poorly delivered; the outcome is unfavourable.
Law.phenomenal_success: The character's argument is brilliant; the client is exonerated or awarded maximum damages.
Law.catastrophic_failure: The argument contains a critical error that alienates the judge; the outcome is far worse than expected.

Law.description: The character writes a binding agreement between parties that protects their client's interests under local law.
Law.success: The contract is valid and enforceable; it correctly reflects the agreed terms.
Law.failure: The contract contains an ambiguity or flaw that weakens its legal force.
Law.phenomenal_success: The contract is airtight and includes protective clauses the client had not thought to ask for.
Law.catastrophic_failure: The contract contains a serious error that makes it invalid or that favours the other party.

Leadership.description: The character addresses soldiers before an engagement to bolster morale and courage.
Leadership.success: Troops fight with conviction; morale holds firm in the opening phase of battle.
Leadership.failure: The speech falls flat; morale is unaffected.
Leadership.phenomenal_success: The speech is stirring; troops fight with exceptional bravery and morale is at peak for the engagement.
Leadership.catastrophic_failure: The speech is perceived as hollow or insulting; morale actually drops.

Leadership.description: The character shouts orders and physically places themselves to halt soldiers who are breaking in a rout.
Leadership.success: A number of soldiers halt and reform; the rout is slowed.
Leadership.failure: The troops continue to flee; the rout cannot be stopped.
Leadership.phenomenal_success: The character halts the rout entirely and troops turn to face the enemy again.
Leadership.catastrophic_failure: The character is swept along by the rout or is killed in the attempt.

Leatherworking.description: The character cuts, shapes, and hardens leather to produce a protective garment.
Leatherworking.success: The armour provides the expected DR and fits correctly.
Leatherworking.failure: The armour is slightly substandard; DR is reduced by 1.
Leatherworking.phenomenal_success: The armour is fine quality; it is both more flexible and provides full DR.
Leatherworking.catastrophic_failure: The leather is ruined by improper hardening; the piece must be remade.

Leatherworking.description: The character patches, re-stitches, and conditions worn leather equipment such as harness, bags, or armour.
Leatherworking.success: The equipment is restored to full function.
Leatherworking.failure: The repair is cosmetic; structural weaknesses remain.
Leatherworking.phenomenal_success: The repair is so thorough the item is as good as new.
Leatherworking.catastrophic_failure: The character's work tears the leather further, making it unusable.

Lifting.description: The character strains to move or lift an object at the edge of their physical capability.
Lifting.success: The object is lifted and moved as needed.
Lifting.failure: The object is too heavy; it cannot be moved.
Lifting.phenomenal_success: The character lifts the object with surprising ease and speed.
Lifting.catastrophic_failure: The character strains a muscle; they suffer injury and cannot attempt again for some time.

Linguistics.description: The character analyses unfamiliar speech or text to determine its linguistic family and likely origin.
Linguistics.success: The character correctly identifies the family and can make useful inferences about the speaker.
Linguistics.failure: The character cannot determine the language.
Linguistics.phenomenal_success: The character identifies the precise dialect and region, and can make informed guesses about meaning.
Linguistics.catastrophic_failure: The character completely misidentifies the language family, drawing false inferences.

Lip Reading.description: The character watches a conversation they cannot hear and reads the speakers' lips to determine the content.
Lip Reading.success: The character catches the general topic and key words.
Lip Reading.failure: The character cannot make out enough to understand.
Lip Reading.phenomenal_success: The character follows the entire conversation as if they had been able to hear it.
Lip Reading.catastrophic_failure: The character misreads the conversation entirely, deriving a false and potentially dangerous conclusion.

Literacy.description: The character reads a formal letter, charter, or legal text and understands its content.
Literacy.success: The character reads the document accurately and comprehends its full meaning.
Literacy.failure: The character struggles with certain words or conventions and may misunderstand details.
Literacy.phenomenal_success: The character reads with expert ease and catches subtle implications or hidden meanings.
Literacy.catastrophic_failure: The character misreads a key element of the document, taking away a seriously wrong understanding.

Literacy.description: The character composes and writes a letter following appropriate formulaic conventions for the recipient's status.
Literacy.success: The letter is correctly formulated and written legibly; it will be taken seriously.
Literacy.failure: The letter has errors or poor phrasing; it makes an unfavourable impression.
Literacy.phenomenal_success: The letter is beautifully composed and perfectly phrased; it creates a very favourable impression.
Literacy.catastrophic_failure: The letter contains a serious error of form or content that causes offence or creates a misunderstanding.

Literature.description: The character writes a long narrative poem celebrating a heroic deed or patron's lineage.
Literature.success: The poem is competent and pleasing; the patron is satisfied and pays the agreed fee.
Literature.failure: The poem is mediocre; it fails to impress and the patron is lukewarm.
Literature.phenomenal_success: The poem is a masterwork that spreads the patron's fame widely and is memorised by bards.
Literature.catastrophic_failure: The poem contains embarrassing errors or insults; the patron is angered and refuses to pay.

Lockpicking.description: The character uses picks and tension wrench to manipulate the pins of a basic lock.
Lockpicking.failure: The lock resists; another attempt is needed.
Lockpicking.phenomenal_success: The lock opens in seconds with barely a sound.
Lockpicking.catastrophic_failure: A pick snaps inside the lock, jamming it permanently.

Lockpicking.description: The character works on a finely crafted or unusual lock with multiple mechanisms.
Lockpicking.success: The lock is opened after careful work.
Lockpicking.failure: The lock resists; the character cannot open it without more time or better tools.
Lockpicking.phenomenal_success: The lock yields quickly; the character understands its mechanism and could open it again in half the time.
Lockpicking.catastrophic_failure: The lock triggers an internal alarm or the character's tools break inside.

Makeup.description: The character applies cosmetic makeup to a performer to give them a specific appearance for a role.
Makeup.success: The makeup is convincing at stage distance; the performer looks the part.
Makeup.failure: The makeup is inadequate; the effect is unconvincing.
Makeup.phenomenal_success: The makeup is masterful; the performer is unrecognisable and the effect is entirely convincing at close range.
Makeup.catastrophic_failure: The makeup is badly applied; it cracks, runs, or is clearly artificial in poor lighting.

Masonry.description: The character cuts and lays stone courses with mortar to build a section of structural wall.
Masonry.success: The wall is plumb, level, and structurally sound.
Masonry.failure: The work is uneven; the wall will require additional finishing.
Masonry.phenomenal_success: The wall is exceptionally well-laid; it is both stronger and more attractive than standard work.
Masonry.catastrophic_failure: The mortar is wrong or the stones are poorly dressed; the wall develops cracks and may fail.

Masonry.action: Identify a Hidden Door in Masonry
Masonry.description: The character taps and examines stone walls for differences that indicate a concealed opening.
Masonry.success: The character locates the outline of a hidden door.
Masonry.phenomenal_success: The character finds the door and its operating mechanism immediately.
Masonry.catastrophic_failure: The character finds nothing and declares the wall solid, missing an obvious hidden door.

Mechanic.description: The character diagnoses and repairs a faulty gear, spindle, or millstone of a water-driven mill.
Mechanic.success: The mill is restored to working order.
Mechanic.failure: The repair is partial; the mill works but is less efficient.
Mechanic.phenomenal_success: The repair improves the mill's efficiency beyond its original state.
Mechanic.catastrophic_failure: The character's work damages the mechanism further; the mill cannot function until a replacement part is obtained.

Merchant.description: The character haggles to get a better price for goods being bought or sold.
Merchant.success: The character achieves a price 10% better than the base asking price.
Merchant.failure: No advantage is gained; the transaction occurs at standard price.
Merchant.phenomenal_success: The character achieves a price 25% better than baseline.
Merchant.catastrophic_failure: The negotiation offends the other party; they add a penalty to the price or refuse to deal.

Merchant.action: Assess the Worth of Trade Goods
Merchant.description: The character examines a lot of goods — spices, cloth, metals — to determine their quality and fair value.
Merchant.success: The character gives an accurate valuation within 10%.
Merchant.failure: The estimate is off by more than 20%.
Merchant.phenomenal_success: The character's valuation is precise and they spot a rare superior item hidden in the lot.
Merchant.catastrophic_failure: The character badly misjudges quality, leading to a very poor transaction.

Meteorology.description: The character observes clouds, wind, pressure, and animal behaviour to forecast the coming day's weather.
Meteorology.success: The forecast is generally accurate; the group can plan accordingly.
Meteorology.failure: The forecast is wrong; conditions are different from expected.
Meteorology.phenomenal_success: The forecast is precise, including approximate timing of weather changes.
Meteorology.catastrophic_failure: The forecast is badly wrong; the group is caught entirely unprepared for severe weather.

Meteorology.description: The character reads atmospheric signs to determine whether a dangerous storm is approaching.
Meteorology.success: The character correctly identifies the incoming storm and its severity.
Meteorology.failure: The signs are misread; no warning is given.
Meteorology.phenomenal_success: The character correctly estimates the storm's arrival time and intensity with impressive precision.
Meteorology.catastrophic_failure: The character dismisses real warning signs; the group is caught in a dangerous storm unprepared.

Mimicry (Animal Sounds).description: The character imitates the mating or distress call of an animal to attract it within range.
Mimicry (Animal Sounds).success: The animal approaches or pauses, allowing a hunter or trapper to act.
Mimicry (Animal Sounds).failure: The call is unconvincing; the animal does not respond or flees.
Mimicry (Animal Sounds).phenomenal_success: The call is perfect; the animal approaches closely and is easily captured or shot.
Mimicry (Animal Sounds).catastrophic_failure: The wrong animal is attracted — a predator instead of prey — or the sound drives all wildlife away.

Mimicry (Bird Calls).description: The character imitates bird calls to communicate signals to allies in the field without arousing suspicion.
Mimicry (Bird Calls).success: The signal is understood correctly by allies.
Mimicry (Bird Calls).failure: The call is too imprecise to convey a clear signal.
Mimicry (Bird Calls).phenomenal_success: The call is perfect; allies receive the signal and those nearby dismiss it as a real bird.
Mimicry (Bird Calls).catastrophic_failure: The call is wrong and confuses allies, or sounds obviously artificial to trained ears nearby.

Mimicry (Human Speech).description: The character copies the voice and speech patterns of a known individual to deceive a listener.
Mimicry (Human Speech).success: The listener is convinced they are hearing the real person.
Mimicry (Human Speech).failure: The imitation is imperfect; the listener is not convinced.
Mimicry (Human Speech).phenomenal_success: Even someone who knows the person very well is completely fooled.
Mimicry (Human Speech).catastrophic_failure: The imitation is so poor it immediately reveals the deception.

Musical Composition.description: The character writes a new song for a specific occasion such as a wedding, coronation, or victory.
Musical Composition.success: The composition is pleasing and appropriate; the patron accepts it.
Musical Composition.failure: The composition is mediocre; the patron is underwhelmed.
Musical Composition.phenomenal_success: The composition is inspired and catches on quickly; people hum it for months.
Musical Composition.catastrophic_failure: The composition is embarrassingly bad or offensive; the patron refuses it and the character's reputation suffers.

Musical Instrument.description: The character plays their instrument for an audience of feasting nobles, merchants, or commoners.
Musical Instrument.success: The performance is appreciated; the character is paid and well-received.
Musical Instrument.failure: The performance is mediocre; no one is particularly impressed.
Musical Instrument.phenomenal_success: The performance is remarkable; tips or gifts are offered and invitations for future engagements follow.
Musical Instrument.catastrophic_failure: The performance is embarrassing; the character is mocked or asked to stop.

Musical Instrument.description: The character plays soft, calming music to reduce tension in a nervous or restless gathering.
Musical Instrument.success: The music eases tension; the crowd becomes calmer and more manageable.
Musical Instrument.failure: The music has no particular effect.
Musical Instrument.phenomenal_success: The music is deeply soothing; even hostile individuals become momentarily peaceful.
Musical Instrument.catastrophic_failure: The character plays badly or chooses the wrong piece; the crowd's mood worsens.

Naturalist.description: The character examines an unfamiliar plant to determine whether it is edible, medicinal, or poisonous.
Naturalist.success: The plant is correctly identified and its properties known.
Naturalist.failure: The character cannot determine the plant's properties.
Naturalist.phenomenal_success: The character identifies the plant precisely and knows optimal preparation or avoidance techniques.
Naturalist.catastrophic_failure: The character misidentifies the plant as safe when it is poisonous, or vice versa.

Naturalist.description: The character reads the habitat, browse marks, and paths to understand where a specific animal is and where it will be.
Naturalist.success: The character identifies the animal's regular routes and likely location.
Naturalist.failure: The signs are unclear; no reliable pattern is determined.
Naturalist.phenomenal_success: The character predicts the animal's next movement precisely, allowing an easy approach or ambush.
Naturalist.catastrophic_failure: The character misreads the signs entirely and leads a hunting party in the wrong direction.

Observation.description: The character carefully surveys terrain ahead for signs of an ambush before entering a dangerous area.
Observation.success: The character spots signs of concealed enemies and can warn the group.
Observation.failure: Nothing is noticed; the ambush remains undetected.
Observation.phenomenal_success: The character identifies the exact position and rough number of ambushers.
Observation.catastrophic_failure: The character declares the area clear and the ambush is sprung at maximum disadvantage.

Observation.description: The character spots an important but easy-to-miss detail in a room, document, or face.
Observation.success: The character notices the detail and understands its significance.
Observation.phenomenal_success: The character notices multiple hidden details and can piece together a coherent picture.
Observation.catastrophic_failure: The character fixates on an irrelevant detail while missing the important one.

Orienteering.description: In featureless terrain — fog, forest, night — the character uses compass, sun, and terrain-reading to stay on course.
Orienteering.success: The group stays on the correct heading and arrives at the destination within acceptable margin.
Orienteering.failure: The group drifts off course; time is wasted correcting.
Orienteering.phenomenal_success: The character navigates with remarkable precision; the group arrives ahead of schedule.
Orienteering.catastrophic_failure: The group becomes seriously lost; it may take hours or a full day to reorient.

Packing.action: Pack a Load for Efficient Carrying
Packing.description: The character loads a horse, mule, or person's pack so weight is distributed for ease of movement.
Packing.success: The load is balanced; the carrier suffers no extra fatigue.
Packing.failure: The load is unbalanced; the carrier tires faster.
Packing.phenomenal_success: The load is packed so efficiently more can be carried without penalty.
Packing.catastrophic_failure: The pack shifts and falls or causes the animal to stumble, potentially injuring it.

Panhandling.description: The character solicits charitable donations from people in a marketplace or at a church door.
Panhandling.success: A modest amount of coin is collected.
Panhandling.failure: Little interest is shown; almost nothing is given.
Panhandling.phenomenal_success: The character's appeal is compelling; a generous donor gives significantly.
Panhandling.catastrophic_failure: The character is driven off by a guard or hostile merchant for causing a nuisance.

Performance.description: The character delivers a prepared speech or dramatic piece to an audience.
Performance.success: The performance is well-received; the audience applauds.
Performance.failure: The performance is stilted; the audience is unimpressed.
Performance.phenomenal_success: The performance is moving and memorable; the character earns significant goodwill or payment.
Performance.catastrophic_failure: The performance is so bad the audience boos, throws things, or walks out.

Philosophy.description: The character engages a scholarly opponent in structured argument, using logic and classical learning.
Philosophy.success: The character's arguments are stronger; neutral observers judge them the winner.
Philosophy.failure: The debate is inconclusive; neither side clearly wins.
Philosophy.phenomenal_success: The character's arguments are so compelling the opponent is genuinely persuaded.
Philosophy.catastrophic_failure: The character's argument is logically flawed; even supporters are embarrassed.

Physician.description: The character applies herbal medicines, poultices, and regimen to combat a patient's infection.
Physician.success: The patient's fever breaks or infection is controlled; recovery proceeds normally.
Physician.failure: The treatment has limited effect; the illness continues its course.
Physician.phenomenal_success: Recovery is rapid; the patient is on their feet within half the expected time.
Physician.catastrophic_failure: The treatment worsens the infection; the patient's condition deteriorates seriously.

Physician.description: The character advises a recovering patient on rest, diet, and activity to optimise their recovery.
Physician.success: The regimen is sound; the patient recovers in normal time.
Physician.failure: The advice is unhelpful; recovery time is not reduced.
Physician.phenomenal_success: The regimen is excellent; the patient recovers in significantly less time and at full strength.
Physician.catastrophic_failure: The advice is harmful; the patient re-injures themselves or suffers a relapse.

Physics.description: Using principles of motion and trajectory, the character estimates how far a siege engine or thrown object will travel.
Physics.success: The calculation is accurate enough to aim effectively.
Physics.failure: The calculation is off; the first shot is well off target.
Physics.phenomenal_success: The calculation is precise; the first shot hits target.
Physics.catastrophic_failure: The calculation is grossly wrong; the projectile goes in a completely unexpected direction.

Pickpocket.action: Steal a Purse in a Crowd
Pickpocket.description: The character uses the cover of a crowd to cut or lift a victim's coin purse.
Pickpocket.success: The purse is taken without the victim noticing.
Pickpocket.failure: The attempt is too risky or clumsy; the character withdraws.
Pickpocket.phenomenal_success: The purse is taken so cleanly the victim will not notice until the next time they reach for it.
Pickpocket.catastrophic_failure: The victim feels the touch; they shout thief and the character must flee or face arrest.

Poetry.description: The character composes a short flattering poem for a patron, knight, or lord on demand.
Poetry.success: The verse is pleasing and appropriate; the recipient is satisfied.
Poetry.failure: The verse is unremarkable; no particular impression is made.
Poetry.phenomenal_success: The verse is clever and memorable; the recipient is genuinely moved and may offer a gift.
Poetry.catastrophic_failure: The verse is offensive or embarrassing; the recipient takes it as an insult.

Poisons.description: The character extracts and concentrates a toxin that causes temporary paralysis when administered.
Poisons.success: The poison is correctly prepared and potent for a single application.
Poisons.failure: The preparation is too weak to be effective.
Poisons.phenomenal_success: The poison is of exceptional purity and will work faster and last longer than expected.
Poisons.catastrophic_failure: The poison contaminates the character's equipment; they may accidentally dose themselves.

Poisons.action: Identify a Poison in Food or Drink
Poisons.description: The character examines a dish or drink by sight, smell, and taste test to detect the presence of poison.
Poisons.success: The character correctly identifies whether the food is poisoned and roughly what type.
Poisons.failure: The character detects nothing; if poisoned, it is still given.
Poisons.phenomenal_success: The character identifies the poison precisely and knows the antidote.
Poisons.catastrophic_failure: The character declares the poisoned food safe, or tastes enough to be affected.

Politics.description: The character analyses current political relationships and events to forecast how a dispute, election, or succession will resolve.
Politics.success: The prediction is broadly correct; the character can advise allies effectively.
Politics.failure: The prediction is off; advisees make suboptimal decisions.
Politics.phenomenal_success: The prediction is precise and includes actionable advice that puts allies in an excellent position.
Politics.catastrophic_failure: The prediction is completely wrong; those who follow the advice end up on the losing side.

Politics.description: The character spends time cultivating relationships with various factions to form a coalition around a shared goal.
Politics.success: The alliance holds; parties cooperate toward the shared objective.
Politics.failure: Parties remain too suspicious; no real alliance forms.
Politics.phenomenal_success: The alliance is unusually cohesive; participants commit genuine resources and loyalty.
Politics.catastrophic_failure: The character's manoeuvring backfires; rival factions unite against the character's side.

Propaganda.description: The character plants a damaging story in the right social circles and ensures it spreads.
Propaganda.success: The rumour circulates and begins to affect the target's reputation.
Propaganda.failure: The rumour fails to catch on; it is dismissed or forgotten.
Propaganda.phenomenal_success: The rumour spreads widely and convincingly; the target suffers a significant reaction penalty.
Propaganda.catastrophic_failure: The rumour is traced back to the character; their own reputation suffers and the target may pursue action.

Propaganda.description: The character composes a written piece designed to damage an individual's or faction's standing.
Propaganda.success: The piece circulates and causes reputational damage to the target.
Propaganda.failure: The piece is too poorly written to be credible; it has little effect.
Propaganda.phenomenal_success: The piece is widely believed and quoted; the target's standing falls significantly.
Propaganda.catastrophic_failure: The authorship is identified; the character faces legal or violent reprisal.

Prospecting.description: The character pans stream sediment to recover alluvial gold dust or flakes.
Prospecting.success: A small but useful amount of gold is recovered.
Prospecting.failure: The work yields nothing or only negligible traces.
Prospecting.phenomenal_success: An unusually rich pocket of sediment yields significant gold.
Prospecting.catastrophic_failure: The character is deceived by fool's gold and invests time in a worthless site.

Public Speaking.description: The character addresses a gathered crowd on a matter of community concern, seeking their support.
Public Speaking.success: The majority of the audience is persuaded or at least sympathetic.
Public Speaking.failure: The crowd is unmoved; opposition is not overcome.
Public Speaking.phenomenal_success: The speech is inspired; the crowd is enthusiastic and ready to act in support.
Public Speaking.catastrophic_failure: The speech turns the crowd hostile; heckling or worse follows.

Research.description: The character searches through manuscripts and records to find information on a specific topic.
Research.success: The character locates the relevant information.
Research.phenomenal_success: The character finds the information sought plus additional context that opens new leads.
Research.catastrophic_failure: The character finds a plausible but incorrect source and confidently acts on wrong information.

Riding.action: Ride at Full Gallop Over Rough Ground
Riding.description: The character urges their horse to full speed across uneven terrain without losing control.
Riding.success: The horse and rider make it through safely at full speed.
Riding.failure: The horse stumbles or slows; speed is reduced.
Riding.phenomenal_success: Horse and rider move at exceptional speed and the character can act freely from the saddle.
Riding.catastrophic_failure: The horse trips; the rider is thrown and takes falling damage.

Riding.description: The character uses rein, leg, and voice to calm a horse that has been spooked in combat.
Riding.success: The horse is brought under control; normal riding resumes.
Riding.failure: The horse continues to panic; the rider may be thrown.
Riding.phenomenal_success: The horse is calmed immediately and may be put back into action this turn.
Riding.catastrophic_failure: The rider is thrown; the horse bolts and is difficult to recover.

Riding.description: The character couches a lance or weapon and drives their horse at full speed into enemy ranks.
Riding.success: The charge connects; maximum damage is dealt and enemy formation is disrupted.
Riding.failure: The horse shies at the last moment; the charge is ineffective.
Riding.phenomenal_success: The charge is devastating; the target is struck perfectly and the character retains full control.
Riding.catastrophic_failure: The horse refuses at the last moment and rears; the rider is thrown into the enemy.

Ritual.description: The character leads a formal religious ceremony such as a mass, wedding, or funeral according to proper rite.
Ritual.success: The ceremony proceeds correctly; participants are spiritually satisfied and the social function is fulfilled.
Ritual.failure: An error is made in the rite; knowledgeable observers notice and the ceremony's validity may be questioned.
Ritual.phenomenal_success: The ceremony is performed with exceptional reverence and skill; participants are deeply moved.
Ritual.catastrophic_failure: A serious ritual error occurs; the ceremony is invalidated and the officiating character is censured.

Ritual.description: The character invokes divine favour over an expedition, harvest, or undertaking using appropriate liturgical form.
Ritual.success: The blessing is correctly performed; those present feel reassured and morale improves.
Ritual.failure: The blessing is performed but uninspiring; no particular morale benefit.
Ritual.phenomenal_success: The blessing is powerful and sincere; morale improves significantly and participants act with extra confidence.
Ritual.catastrophic_failure: The blessing is considered ill-omened by observers; morale is hurt rather than helped.

Running.description: The character runs at high speed over a meaningful distance to deliver urgent news.
Running.success: The message is delivered in time; the character arrives winded but functional.
Running.failure: The character cannot maintain pace; delivery is significantly delayed.
Running.phenomenal_success: The character arrives well ahead of any possible alternative; the early warning is decisive.
Running.catastrophic_failure: The character collapses from exhaustion short of the destination.

Running.description: The character runs at full exertion to outpace someone chasing them.
Running.success: The character opens enough distance to escape.
Running.failure: The pursuer keeps pace; escape is not achieved this attempt.
Running.phenomenal_success: The character loses the pursuer entirely and doubles back to a safe location.
Running.catastrophic_failure: The character trips or is cornered; the pursuer catches up.

Savoir-Faire (Guilds).action: Gain Access to a Guild Meeting
Savoir-Faire (Guilds).description: The character uses knowledge of guild customs and signs to be admitted to a closed professional gathering.
Savoir-Faire (Guilds).success: The character is admitted as a member or guest in good standing.
Savoir-Faire (Guilds).failure: The character cannot demonstrate sufficient credentials; they are turned away.
Savoir-Faire (Guilds).phenomenal_success: The character's manner is so appropriate they are immediately treated as a trusted colleague.
Savoir-Faire (Guilds).catastrophic_failure: The character uses a wrong sign or custom; they are suspected of being an impostor.

Savoir-Faire (Mercenaries).description: The character uses knowledge of soldiers' customs and expectations to reach acceptable contract terms.
Savoir-Faire (Mercenaries).success: Terms are agreed; the company contracts at a fair rate.
Savoir-Faire (Mercenaries).failure: Negotiations stall; the company demands too much or terms cannot be agreed.
Savoir-Faire (Mercenaries).phenomenal_success: The character wins favourable terms and earns respect from the company.
Savoir-Faire (Mercenaries).catastrophic_failure: Ignorance of mercenary customs causes offence; the company refuses to deal.

Savoir-Faire (Nobility).description: The character navigates the complex etiquette, precedence, and protocols of a noble court.
Savoir-Faire (Nobility).success: The character conducts themselves correctly; no social errors are committed.
Savoir-Faire (Nobility).failure: A minor breach of etiquette is noticed; the character is slightly embarrassed.
Savoir-Faire (Nobility).phenomenal_success: The character's conduct is impressive; nobles take positive note and their social position rises.
Savoir-Faire (Nobility).catastrophic_failure: A serious breach of protocol is committed; the character is humiliated or ejected from the gathering.

Savoir-Faire (Servants).description: The character issues instructions to servants in a great house, using appropriate tone and protocols.
Savoir-Faire (Servants).success: The staff cooperates without resentment; tasks are completed properly.
Savoir-Faire (Servants).failure: The instructions are misunderstood or resented; tasks are done poorly.
Savoir-Faire (Servants).phenomenal_success: The staff is motivated and works above expectation; everything is ready ahead of schedule.
Savoir-Faire (Servants).catastrophic_failure: The character offends the staff hierarchy; further instructions are passively resisted.

Savoir-Faire (Town Watch).description: The character interacts with the town watch using knowledge of their customs and chain of command.
Savoir-Faire (Town Watch).success: The guards are helpful and cooperative; information or assistance is provided.
Savoir-Faire (Town Watch).failure: The guards are unhelpful or suspicious.
Savoir-Faire (Town Watch).phenomenal_success: The character gains not just cooperation but active assistance and an escort.
Savoir-Faire (Town Watch).catastrophic_failure: The character inadvertently insults or defies protocol; the guards become hostile.

Scrounging.action: Find Useful Materials in a Ruined Building
Scrounging.description: The character searches through wreckage or abandoned spaces for usable tools, materials, or food.
Scrounging.success: The character finds something useful — rope, iron, wood, food.
Scrounging.phenomenal_success: The character finds significantly more than expected, including an item of genuine value.
Scrounging.catastrophic_failure: The character disturbs an unstable structure and is hurt by falling debris.

Search.action: Search a Person for Concealed Items
Search.description: The character conducts a thorough physical search of a person looking for hidden weapons or contraband.
Search.failure: The search misses one or more hidden items.
Search.phenomenal_success: Not only is everything found, but the character notes every hiding place used.
Search.catastrophic_failure: The search misses an obvious weapon; the searched person attacks with it at the first opportunity.

Search.action: Search a Room for Hidden Objects
Search.description: The character methodically inspects a room for concealed documents, valuables, or secret doors.
Search.success: All relevant hidden objects are found.
Search.failure: Some or all hidden objects are missed.
Search.phenomenal_success: The search is thorough enough to find even extremely well-hidden items.
Search.catastrophic_failure: The character misses a critical hidden item and fails to notice that the room was searched before them.

Sewing.description: The character re-stitches a tear or replaces a button to restore a garment to wearable condition.
Sewing.success: The repair is neat and holding; the garment looks presentable.
Sewing.failure: The repair is messy or weak; it may not hold long.
Sewing.phenomenal_success: The repair is invisible; the garment looks as though it was never damaged.
Sewing.catastrophic_failure: The character makes the tear worse; the garment is ruined.

Sewing.description: The character fashions clothing appropriate to a different social class or occupation for use in a disguise.
Sewing.success: The costume is convincing at a glance and provides a bonus to Disguise.
Sewing.failure: The costume looks homemade; it provides no bonus to Disguise.
Sewing.phenomenal_success: The costume is indistinguishable from genuine professional attire; it grants a significant Disguise bonus.
Sewing.catastrophic_failure: The costume is so obviously artificial that wearing it actually draws attention.

Sex Appeal.description: The character uses personal magnetism and attraction to put a target at ease and elicit useful information.
Sex Appeal.success: The target is charmed and willingly shares information they might otherwise withhold.
Sex Appeal.failure: The target is unmoved; no special information is shared.
Sex Appeal.phenomenal_success: The target is completely disarmed; they share sensitive information and may become an ally.
Sex Appeal.catastrophic_failure: The attempt is seen through; the target becomes defensive or alerts companions.

Shadowing.action: Follow a Subject Through a Town
Shadowing.description: The character trails a target through streets, markets, and buildings without being noticed.
Shadowing.success: The subject is followed successfully; their destination and contacts are observed.
Shadowing.failure: The character is spotted or loses the subject.
Shadowing.phenomenal_success: The character shadows the subject completely undetected for the entire session, learning all movements.
Shadowing.catastrophic_failure: The subject spots the character; they may confront them, flee, or set a trap.

Shiphandling.description: The character guides a large merchant vessel into or out of a crowded harbour using sails and sweeps.
Shiphandling.success: The ship docks or clears harbour without incident.
Shiphandling.failure: The approach is awkward; minor contact with a pier or other vessel occurs.
Shiphandling.phenomenal_success: The manoeuvre is executed with impressive precision; onlookers are impressed.
Shiphandling.catastrophic_failure: The ship strikes another vessel or the pier hard, causing significant damage.

Siege (Chemical).description: The character mixes a combustible compound for use in siege warfare.
Siege (Chemical).success: The mixture is correctly prepared and usable as a weapon.
Siege (Chemical).failure: The mixture is too weak or unstable to be reliable.
Siege (Chemical).phenomenal_success: The mixture is exceptionally potent and ignites powerfully on contact.
Siege (Chemical).catastrophic_failure: The mixture ignites during preparation; fire breaks out among friendly stores.

Siege (Mechanical).description: The character loads, aims, and fires a large crossbow-like siege engine at a specific target.
Siege (Mechanical).success: The bolt strikes within the intended area, damaging the target.
Siege (Mechanical).failure: The shot misses or falls short.
Siege (Mechanical).phenomenal_success: The bolt strikes a critical point on the target, causing maximum damage and possibly disabling a defender.
Siege (Mechanical).catastrophic_failure: A mechanical failure causes the bowstring to snap, injuring the crew.

Singing.action: Perform a Ballad at a Gathering
Singing.description: The character sings a traditional or composed ballad for an audience.
Singing.success: The audience enjoys the performance; applause and small tips follow.
Singing.failure: The performance is unremarkable; little reaction.
Singing.phenomenal_success: The singing is beautiful; listeners are moved and the character's reputation as a performer grows.
Singing.catastrophic_failure: The singing is terrible; the character is mocked and asked to stop.

Sleight of Hand.description: The character conjures an object that was concealed on their person in an apparently magical manner.
Sleight of Hand.success: The object appears without observers seeing where it came from.
Sleight of Hand.failure: Observers see the motion; the trick is clumsy.
Sleight of Hand.phenomenal_success: The move is flawless; even close observers are baffled.
Sleight of Hand.catastrophic_failure: The object drops or the concealment is obviously exposed.

Sleight of Hand.description: The character covertly exchanges one object for another identical or similar item while handling it.
Sleight of Hand.success: The switch is made without anyone noticing.
Sleight of Hand.failure: The switch is not made; the opportunity is missed.
Sleight of Hand.phenomenal_success: The switch is so smooth it defies belief; even a focused observer misses it.
Sleight of Hand.catastrophic_failure: The observer sees the switch clearly; the character is caught red-handed.

Smith (Copper).description: The character melts and casts copper into a mould to produce a pot, bowl, or decorative item.
Smith (Copper).success: The piece is correctly formed and free of major defects.
Smith (Copper).failure: The casting has voids or cracks; it must be remade.
Smith (Copper).phenomenal_success: The piece is of exceptional smoothness and detail, commanding a premium price.
Smith (Copper).catastrophic_failure: A mould failure splashes molten metal; the smith is burned and the piece ruined.

Smith (Iron).description: The character heats, shapes, and tempers iron to produce a functional sword blade.
Smith (Iron).success: The blade is functional and correctly tempered; it performs as a normal sword.
Smith (Iron).failure: The blade is sub-standard; it is brittle or has poor balance.
Smith (Iron).phenomenal_success: The blade is of fine quality; it gains +1 damage or exceptional balance, noted by buyers.
Smith (Iron).catastrophic_failure: Improper tempering makes the blade brittle; it will snap under heavy combat use.

Smith (Iron).description: The character forges and fits iron shoes to a horse's hooves.
Smith (Iron).success: All four shoes are correctly fitted; the horse can work and travel normally.
Smith (Iron).failure: One shoe is poorly fitted; it will work loose within a day of travel.
Smith (Iron).phenomenal_success: The shoes are perfectly fitted; the horse moves with confidence on rocky or wet terrain.
Smith (Iron).catastrophic_failure: A shoe is nailed incorrectly; the horse goes lame.

Smith (Lead & Tin).description: The character melts lead and casts it into moulds to produce sling bullets or handgonne projectiles.
Smith (Lead & Tin).success: Consistent, properly formed projectiles are produced in adequate quantity.
Smith (Lead & Tin).failure: Many projectiles have voids or deformities; they will fly inaccurately.
Smith (Lead & Tin).phenomenal_success: The projectiles are of exceptional consistency; they fly more accurately than normal.
Smith (Lead & Tin).catastrophic_failure: The moulds crack or the lead spills; material is lost and production must restart.

Smuggling.description: The character conceals goods and uses routes, timing, and distraction to pass a search without detection.
Smuggling.success: The contraband passes the checkpoint undiscovered.
Smuggling.failure: The inspectors become suspicious; the character must abandon the attempt.
Smuggling.phenomenal_success: The goods pass completely unnoticed and the character establishes a reliable route for future use.
Smuggling.catastrophic_failure: The contraband is found; the character is arrested and the goods confiscated.

Speed-Reading.action: Skim a Document for Key Information
Speed-Reading.description: The character rapidly scans a lengthy text to extract the most important points without reading every word.
Speed-Reading.success: Key information is identified correctly in a fraction of normal reading time.
Speed-Reading.phenomenal_success: The character extracts all critical information and forms an accurate picture of the whole document.
Speed-Reading.catastrophic_failure: The character misses critical passages and draws incorrect conclusions from the partial reading.

Sprinting.description: The character runs at maximum speed across open ground under fire or pursuit.
Sprinting.success: The character crosses successfully; speed is maximised.
Sprinting.failure: The character cannot sustain top speed; they cross slower than intended.
Sprinting.phenomenal_success: The character crosses with startling speed, outpacing any pursuit or fire.
Sprinting.catastrophic_failure: The character trips and falls in the open, making them an easy target.

Stealth.action: Move Silently Through a Guard Post
Stealth.description: The character moves through an area with active guards, using shadow, cover, and soft movement.
Stealth.success: The character passes without being heard or seen.
Stealth.failure: A guard hears or sees something and investigates.
Stealth.phenomenal_success: The character passes completely undetected and notes the guards' patrol patterns for future reference.
Stealth.catastrophic_failure: The character is spotted immediately; alarm is raised.

Stealth.description: The character sneaks up behind a person or animal from a distance without being detected.
Stealth.success: The character reaches attack range or close proximity undetected.
Stealth.failure: The target becomes aware; they turn or flee.
Stealth.phenomenal_success: The character is within arm's reach completely undetected; a free attack or grab is possible.
Stealth.catastrophic_failure: The character is spotted at a distance; the target alerts others.

Strategy.description: The character analyses terrain, logistics, and enemy strength to create an overall military plan.
Strategy.success: The plan is sound; following it gives a reasonable chance of success.
Strategy.failure: The plan has significant gaps; unanticipated problems arise.
Strategy.phenomenal_success: The plan is brilliant; it exploits the enemy's weaknesses and maximises friendly strengths.
Strategy.catastrophic_failure: The plan is fundamentally flawed; following it leads to serious setbacks.

Strategy.description: The character analyses available intelligence and strategic principles to predict where the enemy will move.
Strategy.success: The prediction is broadly correct; friendly forces are positioned advantageously.
Strategy.failure: The prediction is off; forces are out of position.
Strategy.phenomenal_success: The prediction is precise; friendly forces are perfectly placed to intercept or avoid the enemy.
Strategy.catastrophic_failure: Forces are positioned exactly where the enemy intended them to be; they are ambushed or cut off.

Streetwise.action: Find a Fence for Stolen Goods
Streetwise.description: The character navigates criminal social networks to locate a buyer for illegally obtained items.
Streetwise.success: A willing buyer is found; goods are sold for a reasonable fraction of value.
Streetwise.failure: No willing buyer can be found at this time.
Streetwise.phenomenal_success: An excellent buyer is found who pays above-average prices and may provide future criminal contacts.
Streetwise.catastrophic_failure: The character approaches someone who is an informant or guard; their activities are reported.

Streetwise.description: The character moves through the underworld of a city to gather information about criminal activity.
Streetwise.success: Useful information about crimes, gangs, or criminal plans is obtained.
Streetwise.failure: The character hears only vague or useless rumours.
Streetwise.phenomenal_success: The character learns something specific and actionable about a planned crime or criminal organisation.
Streetwise.catastrophic_failure: The character is noticed asking the wrong questions; a criminal group marks them for trouble.

Surgery.description: The character carefully extracts a barbed arrowhead from a wound without causing additional damage.
Surgery.success: The arrow is removed cleanly; the wound can be properly dressed and will heal.
Surgery.failure: The extraction is incomplete or causes additional tearing; the wound is worsened.
Surgery.phenomenal_success: The extraction is perfect; minimal blood loss and the wound is immediately ready for closing.
Surgery.catastrophic_failure: The extraction tears the wound badly; the patient loses significant HP and infection risk rises.

Surgery.description: The character performs an emergency amputation to prevent a life-threatening infection from spreading.
Surgery.success: The amputation is clean and the stump properly cauterised; the patient has a good chance of survival.
Surgery.failure: The surgery is rough; the patient suffers additional shock and has a lower chance of survival.
Surgery.phenomenal_success: The procedure is so swift and precise the patient loses minimal blood and recovers faster than expected.
Surgery.catastrophic_failure: A serious error during the surgery — wrong level, uncontrolled bleeding — kills or fatally worsens the patient.

Survival.action: Find Food and Water in the Wild
Survival.description: The character uses knowledge of the environment to locate edible plants, water sources, and small game.
Survival.success: Enough food and water is found to sustain the character for the day.
Survival.failure: Nothing useful is found; the character goes hungry.
Survival.phenomenal_success: An excellent source is found that can sustain the whole party for several days.
Survival.catastrophic_failure: The character selects a poisonous plant or contaminated water source, causing illness.

Survival.description: The character constructs a simple but effective shelter from available materials to protect against weather.
Survival.success: The shelter keeps occupants dry and provides insulation against cold.
Survival.failure: The shelter is inadequate; occupants are partially exposed to the elements.
Survival.phenomenal_success: The shelter is surprisingly comfortable and completely weatherproof.
Survival.catastrophic_failure: The shelter collapses or is placed in a dangerous location such as a flood path.

Survival.description: The character uses friction or percussion with natural materials to start a fire.
Survival.success: Fire is successfully produced within a reasonable time.
Survival.failure: The attempt fails; no fire is produced.
Survival.phenomenal_success: Fire is produced quickly and easily; a sustainable fire is established within minutes.
Survival.catastrophic_failure: All suitable tinder is exhausted; fire cannot be started with these materials.

Swimming.description: The character swims across a fast-moving river, fighting current and maintaining direction.
Swimming.success: The character crosses successfully, landing downstream but safe.
Swimming.failure: The character is pushed back or cannot make headway against the current.
Swimming.phenomenal_success: The character crosses swiftly and precisely, landing at their intended point.
Swimming.catastrophic_failure: The character is overcome by the current, dragged under, or swept into rocks.

Swimming.description: The character attempts to stay afloat and move while encumbered by armour.
Swimming.success: The character stays afloat and reaches shore, exhausted.
Swimming.failure: The character cannot stay afloat; they must shed armour or risk drowning.
Swimming.phenomenal_success: The character manages armoured swimming with surprising efficiency.
Swimming.catastrophic_failure: The character sinks rapidly; without rescue they will drown.

Tactics.description: The character assigns roles and timing for a small group's attack on a position.
Tactics.success: The unit attacks effectively; each member acts in coordination, gaining positional advantage.
Tactics.failure: The plan breaks down; members act independently and lose the advantage.
Tactics.phenomenal_success: The attack is so well-coordinated the enemy is caught completely off guard; each attacker gets a bonus.
Tactics.catastrophic_failure: Miscommunication causes friendly interference; members hinder each other.

Tactics.description: The character positions fighters along a route to attack a passing enemy at maximum disadvantage.
Tactics.success: The ambush is set correctly; enemies are caught by surprise.
Tactics.failure: The ambush position is suboptimal; enemies may spot or avoid it.
Tactics.phenomenal_success: The ambush is perfect; enemies walk into it with no chance of escape.
Tactics.catastrophic_failure: Enemies detect the ambush; they counter-ambush the would-be attackers.

Teaching.action: Instruct a Student in a Skill
Teaching.description: The character provides focused instruction to a student attempting to learn or improve a skill.
Teaching.success: The student makes measurable progress; their training time is reduced.
Teaching.failure: The instruction is ineffective; the student makes no more progress than they would alone.
Teaching.phenomenal_success: The instruction is inspired; the student makes double the expected progress.
Teaching.catastrophic_failure: The instruction contains errors; the student develops bad habits that must later be unlearned.

Teamster.action: Drive a Loaded Wagon Over Poor Road
Teamster.description: The character guides a heavy cart or wagon team along a rutted or muddy track.
Teamster.success: The wagon makes it through; no cargo is lost.
Teamster.failure: The wagon gets stuck or a wheel sinks; significant delay.
Teamster.phenomenal_success: The character finds the best line and the wagon makes unusually good time.
Teamster.catastrophic_failure: The wagon overturns or an axle breaks; cargo may be damaged or lost.

Theology.description: The character applies theological knowledge and pastoral skill to comfort a spiritually distressed individual.
Theology.success: The person is comforted; their resolve and morale are restored.
Theology.failure: The counsel is insufficient; the person remains troubled.
Theology.phenomenal_success: The counsel is profoundly helpful; the person's faith is strengthened and they become a committed ally.
Theology.catastrophic_failure: The counsel is perceived as cold or wrong; the person's distress deepens or they reject the faith.

Theology.description: The character uses doctrinal knowledge to assess whether a ritual or belief observed in the community is orthodox.
Theology.success: The character correctly identifies any heretical deviation and can cite the relevant doctrine.
Theology.failure: The character cannot determine whether the practice is heretical.
Theology.phenomenal_success: The character identifies the specific sect or tradition of the heresy, providing grounds for formal investigation.
Theology.catastrophic_failure: The character declares a perfectly orthodox practice heretical, causing a serious religious dispute.

Torture.description: The character applies controlled physical pain to break a prisoner's resistance and elicit a confession or information.
Torture.success: The prisoner provides information; whether true or false requires further verification.
Torture.failure: The prisoner endures the session without confessing.
Torture.phenomenal_success: The prisoner breaks completely and provides detailed, accurate information.
Torture.catastrophic_failure: The prisoner dies or loses their mind before confessing; all information is permanently lost.

Tracking.description: The character reads tracks, broken branches, and disturbed ground to follow a person or animal.
Tracking.success: The trail is followed successfully; the quarry's direction and rough distance ahead are known.
Tracking.failure: The trail is lost; the character cannot determine where it leads.
Tracking.phenomenal_success: The character follows the trail rapidly and accurately, estimating the quarry's pace and destination.
Tracking.catastrophic_failure: The character follows the wrong set of tracks, wasting time and potentially heading into danger.

Tracking.description: The character examines a footprint or sign to estimate how long ago it was made.
Tracking.success: The character correctly estimates the age of the track within a reasonable margin.
Tracking.failure: The character cannot determine the track's age.
Tracking.phenomenal_success: The character estimates the age precisely and also determines the number of individuals and their loads.
Tracking.catastrophic_failure: The character badly misjudges the age; fresh tracks are called old or vice versa.

Traps.description: The character sets a noose or spring-trap on an animal trail to catch small game.
Traps.success: The snare is correctly set and will capture small animals.
Traps.failure: The snare is poorly positioned or incorrectly tied; it will not catch anything.
Traps.phenomenal_success: The snare is so well-placed it captures game overnight with certainty.
Traps.catastrophic_failure: The snare springs while being set, injuring the character.

Traps.description: The character searches for and then safely neutralises a concealed trap before it can harm anyone.
Traps.success: The trap is found and disarmed without triggering it.
Traps.failure: The trap is not found, or is found but cannot be disarmed.
Traps.phenomenal_success: The trap is disarmed and can be reset or harvested for its components.
Traps.catastrophic_failure: The trap is triggered during the disarming attempt; the character takes full damage.

Traps.description: The character digs and conceals a deep pit on a path to capture or injure those who walk into it.
Traps.success: The pit is well-concealed and will not be noticed until someone falls in.
Traps.failure: The concealment is poor; the pit is visible to any observant person.
Traps.phenomenal_success: The trap is perfect; even a searching character would need an exceptional roll to find it.
Traps.catastrophic_failure: The pit collapses during construction or the covering fails immediately.

Urban Survival.description: The character uses knowledge of city life to secure a safe place to sleep through charity, barter, or social networks.
Urban Survival.success: Safe lodging is found for the night.
Urban Survival.failure: No suitable lodging can be found; the character must sleep rough.
Urban Survival.phenomenal_success: The character not only finds lodging but a sympathetic host who provides food and information.
Urban Survival.catastrophic_failure: The character ends up in a dangerous location or with untrustworthy people who may rob or harm them.

Urban Survival.description: The character uses knowledge of alleys, rooftops, and crowd flow to lose pursuers in an urban environment.
Urban Survival.success: The character loses the pursuers and reaches safety.
Urban Survival.failure: The character cannot shake pursuit; they must find another means of escape.
Urban Survival.phenomenal_success: The character loses pursuit completely and can return to the area later without risk.
Urban Survival.catastrophic_failure: The character runs into a dead end or is cornered by converging pursuers.

Ventriloquism.description: The character projects their voice to appear to come from a different location, deceiving observers.
Ventriloquism.success: Observers believe the sound came from elsewhere; a diversion or deception is achieved.
Ventriloquism.failure: The voice sounds wrong; observers are not convinced.
Ventriloquism.phenomenal_success: The effect is completely convincing; observers head toward the false source of the sound.
Ventriloquism.catastrophic_failure: The attempt makes an odd sound that draws attention to the character rather than away.

Weapon.description: The character makes a precise attack targeting the limb of an opponent to cripple rather than kill.
Weapon.success: The limb is struck; the target suffers injury and the affected limb is impaired.
Weapon.failure: The targeted strike misses or strikes a less vulnerable area.
Weapon.phenomenal_success: The limb is completely crippled; the target can no longer use it and is in shock.
Weapon.catastrophic_failure: The attacker over-commits; they stumble and give the opponent a free attack.

Weapon.description: The character deflects an incoming attack and immediately follows with a counter-strike.
Weapon.success: The parry succeeds and the riposte connects; the opponent is dealt a blow.
Weapon.failure: The parry succeeds but the riposte misses.
Weapon.phenomenal_success: The parry disarms the opponent and the riposte is a critical hit.
Weapon.catastrophic_failure: The parry fails; the character takes full damage from the attack.

Weapon.description: The character uses technique to knock or wrench a weapon from an opponent's grip.
Weapon.success: The weapon is knocked from the opponent's hand.
Weapon.failure: The attempt fails; the opponent retains their weapon.
Weapon.phenomenal_success: The disarm is so powerful the weapon flies far away; the opponent cannot retrieve it quickly.
Weapon.catastrophic_failure: The attempt is reversed; the character's own weapon is knocked away.

Weapon.description: The character adopts a defensive posture, sacrificing offensive effectiveness to maximise their chance of blocking attacks.
Weapon.success: The character's defences hold; incoming attacks are parried or dodged consistently.
Weapon.failure: The defensive strategy provides no particular advantage.
Weapon.phenomenal_success: The character is untouchable for the duration; no attack gets through.
Weapon.catastrophic_failure: The overly cautious stance leaves a critical opening; the opponent exploits it for a devastating hit.

Writing.description: The character compiles observations and intelligence into a clear, usable written report.
Writing.success: The report is clear, well-organised, and accurately conveys the gathered intelligence.
Writing.failure: The report is confusing or incomplete; key information is hard to extract.
Writing.phenomenal_success: The report is exemplary; it is easily acted upon and establishes the character's credibility as an agent.
Writing.catastrophic_failure: The report contains errors or is so poorly written it misleads its recipient.

Writing.description: The character composes a letter intended to convince the recipient to take a specific action.
Writing.success: The letter is persuasive; the recipient is inclined to comply.
Writing.failure: The letter fails to persuade; the recipient is unmoved.
Writing.phenomenal_success: The letter is compelling and eloquent; the recipient acts immediately and favourably.
Writing.catastrophic_failure: The letter is offensive or clumsy; the recipient is antagonised rather than persuaded.
